description: A market research firm is running a consumer electronics panel study and needs to collect exactly 25 responses from each of four demographic segments to ensure balanced representation. Log in at http://localhost/index.php/admin (admin/Admin123!) and configure four response quotas for the 'Consumer Electronics Preferences Study 2024' survey that terminate the survey once the limit of 25 is reached: 'Young Male' (GENDER=Male, AGE_RANGE=18-34), 'Young Female' (GENDER=Female, AGE_RANGE=18-34), 'Mid-Age Male' (GENDER=Male, AGE_RANGE=35-54), and 'Mid-Age Female' (GENDER=Female, AGE_RANGE=3

metadata.occupation_context: Market Research Analysts and Marketing Specialists
metadata.instrument_source: Consumer electronics purchase behavior survey (GfK/Nielsen methodology)
